Metadata.title: AI Website Builder
Metadata.description: Describe your business in plain language — a professional frontend is generated automatically.

PlatformFooter.disclaimer: This site was rapidly built with artificial intelligence as an MVP (Minimum Viable Product). To bring the project to a production-ready level, add new features, and receive technical support, we recommend contacting the developer.

Home.heroTitle: Describe your business — get a ready site
Home.heroSubtitle: Plain-language prompts, live preview, and ZIP export. No technical skills required.
Home.flowSubtitle: You write on the left, preview on the right, export when you are happy.
Home.flowStep1Desc: Describe your business in simple words.
Home.flowStep2Desc: Layout, colors, and sections are assembled for you.
Home.flowStep3Desc: Review instantly in the browser and iterate.
Home.flowStep4Desc: Download a ZIP or a Next.js starter project.

Wallet.hint: Trial: 3 free generations + 50 starter tokens. Multi-page site: 50 tokens; single-page (v1): 10 tokens.

BuilderLogin.title: Sign in to Builder
BuilderLogin.subtitle: Email or phone + password. (Shared BUILDER_PASSWORD still works — leave contact empty.)

BuilderForgot.title: Reset password
BuilderForgot.subtitle: If an account exists, we recorded a reset request. In production, you would receive an email.
BuilderForgot.toastOk: If the account exists, a reset was created.
BuilderForgot.afterNote: Check your email for the reset link (when email delivery is configured).

BuilderReset.title: Choose a new password
BuilderReset.subtitle: Use the token from your reset link.
BuilderReset.toastShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
BuilderReset.toastOk: Password updated. Please sign in again.

BuilderSignup.metaDescription: Create a builder account — name, contact, and password.
BuilderSignup.title: Sign up
BuilderSignup.subtitle: Create a new account and start building websites.
BuilderSignup.contactHint: Use a valid email, or a phone number with 9–15 digits.
BuilderSignup.haveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
BuilderSignup.successBody: You are signed in. You can now use the AI builder and plans.
BuilderSignup.toastTaken: This email or phone is already registered.
BuilderSignup.errPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.
BuilderSignup.errContact: Enter an email or phone number.

Dashboard.title: Dashboard
Dashboard.subtitle: Plan, subscription end date, and browser token balance.
Dashboard.adminMode: Admin session: Pro tier is used for AI generation.

manualReceipt.title: Manual payment receipt
manualReceipt.subtitle: Non-Payme transfers: generate a code, put it in the payment comment, then upload a screenshot of the receipt.
manualReceipt.commentHint: Put exactly {code} in the transfer «Comment» field — otherwise the receipt is rejected.
manualReceipt.notifyTelegramHint: e.g. 123456789 — optional; leave empty if you only rely on admin review.
manualReceipt.issuedOk: Code is ready. Pay, then upload the receipt.
manualReceipt.warnSuspiciousMeta: EXIF suggests an editor (e.g. Photoshop) — admin will see «SHUBHALI CHEK».
manualReceipt.errLogin: Sign in with the builder password first.
manualReceipt.errBilling: Click «Get payment code» first — the comment code must appear on the receipt.

Onboarding.step1Body: Share a few details about the project first, then send your main brief in the next message. The chat on the left keeps the full thread for the AI.
Onboarding.step2Body: The live preview on the right updates with your layout, colors, and pages as soon as the schema is ready.
Onboarding.step3Body: When you are happy, download the ZIP and deploy to Vercel or Netlify (see the guide at the bottom of the page).

Prompt.title: Chat with AI
Prompt.subtitle: When you send a description, the preview updates right away.
Prompt.subtitleFixMode: Schema is ready — describe the bug or change and the AI will patch it.
Prompt.label: Describe your business in plain language
Prompt.placeholder: Example: a small café in Tashkent, fast meals for students…
Prompt.placeholderFix: Example: fix the hero title typo, add a phone number, add a team block on About…
Prompt.contextGatherIntro: Before we generate the full site, share a bit more about the project — details help the result match your expectations. Then type your main brief in the field below and press Send again.
Prompt.contextGatherAck: Thanks! Now write your **main** brief (what you sell, where you operate, how to contact you) in the box below and press Send — I will build the schema from that message plus our chat.
Prompt.contextHintSubtitle: Step one: a short clarification. Then send your main request separately — or skip if you already know exactly what you want.
Prompt.skipDetailToast: Detail step skipped — you can generate directly now.
Prompt.toastPromptTooLong: Text is too long. Maximum {max} characters.
Prompt.toastInvalidResponse: The server response was not valid JSON.
Prompt.toastGenerating: AI is preparing your site schema…
Prompt.toastFixing: AI is analysing the schema and applying fixes…
Prompt.toastInsufficientTokens: You are out of free runs and tokens. Paid plans will unlock higher limits soon.
Prompt.assistantErrorRetry: Something went wrong — please try again.
Prompt.assistantFallbackNote: The model output didn’t pass validation, so a safe template was applied — edit the copy and sections.
Prompt.assistantFixReady: Fix applied to “{siteName}”. Check the preview.
Prompt.guestOptionalHint: Guest mode works out of the box. For dashboard tokens:
Prompt.builderFlowHint: Pick a template → describe your business → press Send. When ready, use preview on the right and export buttons below.
Prompt.templatePickerTitle: What kind of website do you need?
Prompt.templatePickerHelper: Choose the option that fits you best
Prompt.templateCardBusinessDesc: Best for small businesses and service providers.
Prompt.templateCardCorporateDesc: Trust, team, and formal contact paths.
Prompt.templateCardLandingDesc: One offer or campaign — short and focused.
Prompt.toastRateLimited: Too many requests — wait a moment and try again.
Prompt.retryHint: The last generation failed. You can retry with the same prompt.
Prompt.authWallTitle: Sign in to use AI generation.
Prompt.toastNeedBuilderLogin: Please sign in with your builder account first.
Prompt.toastApiUnauthorized: Session expired or sign-in required — please sign in again.
Prompt.toastFixNeedSchema: Generate a site first. “Fix bug” works after a schema exists.
Prompt.fixCommandPatterns: fix the bug|fix bug|исправь ошибку|исправь|xatoni tuzat

Preview.title: Real-time preview
Preview.statusPlaceholderSr: No site schema yet — showing the placeholder preview
Preview.aiThinkingHint: The model is syncing layout, theme, and sections — just a few seconds.
Preview.footerNote: The view is provided via srcDoc — it does not affect the main app CSS.
Preview.exportNextTitle: Download a Next.js 14 App Router project (static export: npm run build → out/)
Preview.placeholderLead: This area updates after the AI response — it does not affect the main app styles.

NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.description: The address may be wrong or the page was removed.

ErrorPage.title: Something went wrong
ErrorPage.description: Reload the page or try again later. If it keeps happening, contact support.

GlobalError.title: Critical error
GlobalError.description: The app failed to load. Refresh or come back shortly.

Deployment.aboutBody: This is a SaaS MVP: AI turns voice or text into a structured site schema, with a live preview and ZIP export. Multi-page layouts (Home, About, Services, Contact) and one-click design refresh are supported.
Deployment.deployBody: Upload the static assets from your ZIP to a free static host:
Deployment.deployVercel: Vercel — run `vercel deploy` or connect a Git repository for continuous deployment.
Deployment.deployNetlify: Netlify — drag and drop the build folder, or deploy with the Netlify CLI.
Deployment.deployZip: Your ZIP includes `index.html` and `styles.css` — ideal for CDN-backed static hosting.
Deployment.domainCardBody: If you cannot attach or configure a domain by yourself, reach out to our developer — we will guide you through DNS, SSL, and go-live checks.

Pricing.title: Plans & billing
Pricing.subtitle: Pick a billing period — price updates automatically.
Pricing.legalNote: Checkout runs on Payme (UZS, charged in tiyin). USD in the grid is a visual anchor; the server amount uses PAYME_USD_TO_UZS_RATE. Configure Payme account keys: user_id, plan, months.
Pricing.payModalBody: {tier} — {months} months. You will see the exact UZS amount on Payme.
Pricing.payModalHint: Make sure you are signed in to the builder (/builder-login) before continuing.
Pricing.payErrorNeedLogin: Please sign in with the builder password first, then try again.
Pricing.payErrorNotConfigured: Payme is not configured on the server (PAYME_MERCHANT_ID / PAYME_MERCHANT_KEY).
Pricing.payErrorNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.

Login.title: Admin sign-in
Login.subtitle: Email authentication is coming soon. For now, use the admin password from your environment.

Admin.title: Admin panel
Admin.subtitle: Telegram users and generated sites.
Admin.emptySubs: No subscription rows yet — the Prisma Subscription table is ready.
Admin.statActiveSubsHint: Subscriptions with no expiry or future expiry.
Admin.billingAccountsHint: Token balance for web builder (Payme / receipts).
Admin.approveSubtitle: Credits tokens and extends subscription on the linked billing account.
Admin.platformStatsUnavailable: Extended analytics require the latest database migration (managed subscriptions tables).
Admin.pRevenueBreakdown: Payme completed: {payme} so‘m · managed “purchased” rows: {managed} so‘m
Admin.pAcqTg: Active managed subs: Telegram Mini App
Admin.grantHint: Creates a managed subscription row, cancels previous ACTIVE rows for the same target, and writes a full audit entry. Passwords are never shown here.
Admin.auditHint: Immutable trail for grants, plan edits, password resets, and session invalidations.
Admin.unifiedUsersHint: Safe directory: no password hashes or secrets. Telegram rows include linked website profiles when present.
Admin.uSetPwdHint: Minimum 12 characters. Stored as scrypt hash; nothing is echoed back after save.
Admin.toastTgLogout: Telegram bot sessions cleared for this user.

ApiGenerate.invalidPayload: Request body is invalid or incomplete.
ApiGenerate.promptTooLong: Text is too long. Maximum length: {max} characters.
ApiGenerate.contextTooLarge: Chat context is too large. Please shorten earlier messages.
ApiGenerate.unauthorized: Forbidden — builder or admin session required.
ApiGenerate.rateLimited: Too many AI requests from this network. Please wait a minute and try again.
ApiGenerate.schemaValidation: Schema validation failed on the server.
